sourceRef.citation: Abd. Rahim, Mukhlis Bakri, Muhammad Ridwan et al. 2026

statement.en: Tinjauan Hukum Islam terhadap Praktik Akad Utang Piutang Uang dengan Pelunasan Barang di Desa Lampasio Kecamatan Lampasio Kabupaten Tolitoli

proposer: Abd. Rahim, Mukhlis Bakri, Muhammad Ridwan

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a provisional legal-theological analysis of Islamic contract law (akad) applied to a specific debt-settlement practice in an Indonesian village. The axiom combines: (1) established Islamic jurisprudence (riba prohibition, contract validity rules—TRUE component), (2) empirical observation of local practice requiring validation (FLOWING component), and (3) normative legal judgment that remains context-dependent and subject to scholarly debate (BOTH component). The work is dated 2026 (future), suggesting preprint/provisional status. No refutation is evident, but validation requires community expert review.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: お金の債務と物質的返済の間にある正義は、意図の純潔さの積分である。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 両世界の取引者の間で、意図と実行が交差する天秤の道。
